prestazioni: Engine: F4Rt 1.6L turbocharged inline-4 (engine code: F4R 874) with a forged internals build including Manley H-beam connecting rods, Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.0:1 compression ratio), and ACL Race Series bearings for 300+ HP reliability on E85 fuel. Turbo upgrade to Garrett GT2860RS-5 with a custom 0.63 A/R turbine housing and 60mm compressor wheel for optimized spool and flow.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors paired with a Radium Engineering dual-core fuel rail and AEM 340lph in-tank fuel pump. Standalone ECU swap to Link G4+ Xtreme with custom flex-fuel mapping and launch control for 0-60 mph in 4.8s.

Suspension & Handling: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8-position adjustable damping, custom-valved for the Twingo RS chassis. Polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF1234K) for subframe and control arms, paired with Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (22mm) and front strut brace from Sabelt (Twingo RS-specific).
estetica: Aero: Custom carbon fiber front splitter from Maxton Design (Twingo RS-specific, part #MX1001) with integrated canards, paired with a Maxton Design GT-style rear diffuser (part #MX1002) and a 3-piece carbon fiber rear wing from Seibon (custom-molded for the Twingo RS hatch).

Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 17x8 +35 ET wheels in matte gunmetal, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (215/40/17). Custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) from H&R to fill arches with zero rubbing.

Exterior: Full Respray in Renault Sport’s original ‘Jaune Sirius’ (color code: 369) with a 3-stage PPG paint system, including a matte clear coat. Custom vinyl overlays from VViViD (gloss black roof, mirror caps, and rear hatch spoiler) with a de-badged front grille and LED DRLs from LUX Automotive (Twingo RS-specific, part #LUX-REN-TWINGO).
